title: Define and validate Flow Kit repositories
body:
## Problem
External kit repositories need a validated contract.

## Scope
- Add contract docs.
- Validate local kit folders.

## Acceptance criteria
- Valid fixture passes.
- Invalid fixtures fail.

## Dependencies
Requires kontourai/flow#2.

## Source artifact
`.kontourai/flow-agents/flow-agents-kit-platform-backlog/flow-agents-kit-platform-backlog--idea-to-backlog.md`

title: Install Flow Kits
body:
## Scope
Install kits.

## Acceptance criteria
Installer works.

## Dependencies
Blocked by #22.

title: Research Flow Kit distribution
body:
## Scope
Research options.

## Acceptance criteria
Research note exists.

title: Teach pull-work to use configured backlog providers
body:
## Scope
Normalize providers.

## Acceptance criteria
Pull-work selects #22.

title: Emit source revision metadata and structured blockers
body:
## Problem
Downstream pickup needs durable source revision and blocker metadata.

## Scope
- Emit provider-neutral work-item metadata.
- Preserve human-readable blocker prose.

## Acceptance criteria
- Source revision fields normalize.
- Structured blockers preserve provider refs and text blockers.

## Dependencies / Blockers
Requires kontourai/flow#2.
Blocked by product decision on rollout scope.

## Source artifact
`.kontourai/flow-agents/idea-to-backlog-source-revision-structured-blockers/idea-to-backlog-source-revision-structured-blockers--plan.md`

<!-- flow-agents:work-item-metadata
{
  "schema_version": "1.0",
  "source_revisions": [
    {
      "repo": "kontourai/flow-agents",
      "planned_base_ref": "main",
      "planned_base_sha": "aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa",
      "planned_at": "2026-06-03T03:23:14Z",
      "planning_artifact_ref": ".kontourai/flow-agents/idea-to-backlog-source-revision-structured-blockers/idea-to-backlog-source-revision-structured-blockers--plan.md",
      "planning_scope_refs": [
        "kits/builder/skills/idea-to-backlog/SKILL.md",
        "context/contracts/work-item-contract.md"
      ]
    },
    {
      "repo": "kontourai/flow",
      "planned_base_ref": "main",
      "planned_base_sha": "bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb",
      "planned_at": "2026-06-03T03:23:14Z",
      "planning_artifact_ref": ".kontourai/flow-agents/idea-to-backlog-source-revision-structured-blockers/idea-to-backlog-source-revision-structured-blockers--plan.md",
      "planning_scope_refs": ["context/contracts/work-item-contract.md"]
    }
  ],
  "blockers": [
    {
      "type": "work_item",
      "ref": "kontourai/flow#2",
      "status": "blocked",
      "summary": "Requires Flow contract issue first."
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "status": "blocked",
      "summary": "Product decision on rollout scope."
    }
  ]
}
-->

title: Legacy issue with invalid metadata marker
body:
## Scope
Keep prose fallback working when metadata is malformed.

## Acceptance criteria
Fallback blocker extraction still works.

## Dependencies / Blockers
Requires #22.

<!-- flow-agents:work-item-metadata
{ invalid json
-->

title: Structured-only cross-repo blocker
body:

## Acceptance criteria
